summary: Separate bare go planning from state mutation
description: Bare go --json currently creates a task and dirties .go state even when used as an inspection/benchmark command. Add an explicit write/execute boundary so plan/readback modes do not mutate state, while actual go execution can still create intent tasks.
acceptance: Bare go has a non-mutating dry-run/plan path for --json inspection.
Intent task creation only happens under explicit execution/write semantics or documented interactive go semantics.
